message:
Add checkpoint + panels branch tests (shortHash, shouldPulse, redactSecrets 100%)

- checkpoint/branch_test.go: shortHash, isPathWithinDirResolved, gzipDecompress,
  redactSecrets nil config, sanitizeName edge cases
- panels/alerts_test.go: shouldPulse all branches (nil map, unknown key, within/expired/future)
- shortHash: 66.7%→100%, redactSecrets: 90%→100%, gzipDecompress: 80%→100%
- isPathWithinDirResolved: 77.8%→94.4%, shouldPulse: 71.4%→100%
- checkpoint: 57.5%→57.9%, panels: 67.8%→67.9%
